introSection: Over Water Roller Coaster (Simplified Chinese: 水上过山车) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Honey Lake Entertainment City in Futain, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride closed in 2007 or earlier. It remained standing but not operating until it was demolished in 2024.

fullText:
Over Water Roller Coaster (Simplified Chinese: 水上过山车) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Honey Lake Entertainment City in Futain, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.

The ride closed in 2007 or earlier. It remained standing but not operating until it was demolished in 2024.
